raw_consumer_statement: My card was compromised and they stated it would take XXXX billing cycles to reverse and fix. This conversation was had XX/XX/XXXX while I was in the XXXX. It is now XX/XX/XXXX and its been XXXX billing cycles and they have not fixed anything. Instead, they keep charging me fees for unpaid the amount every time I call them to get an update on why its taking so long. They tell me theyll call me back within XXXX hours and they never do. I have done so over XXXX times already. The company is Citibank.
